description: Perform a survival analysis on customer churn data using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/TelcoChurn.csv. Conduct a Cox Regression analysis with 'tenure' as the time variable, 'Churn' as the event status (defining 'Yes' as the event), and 'Contract', 'PaymentMethod', and 'MonthlyCharges' as covariates. The analysis must include a proportional hazards assumption test and a forest plot. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ChurnAnalysis.jasp and create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/churn_risk_report.txt. The report should include the Hazard Ratio (Exp(B)) for 'Contract: Two year', the P-value for the Global Proportional Hazards Test, and a statement interpreting whether the proportional hazards assumption was met based on the p-value.
